meta.title: Mikel Aramendia · Web Enthusiast Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Mikel Aramendia, a web enthusiast from Barcelona who loves building websites for the fun and challenge of it. Open to collaborations and projects.
meta.og_description: I'm Mikel, a web enthusiast from Barcelona. I love building websites for the fun and challenge of it. Open to collaborations — explore my projects and experiments.
meta.twitter_description: I'm Mikel, a web enthusiast from Barcelona. I love building websites for the fun and challenge of it. Open to collaborations — explore my projects and experiments.

hero.tagline: Simple, useful, and built with care

about.title: About Me
about.profile_pic_alt: Mikel Aramendia, web enthusiast from Barcelona
about.paragraph2: I've always been interested in technology and the creative potential of the web. Although my background is in business studies, much of how I create comes from other places: before code I went through graffiti, skateboarding, photography, electronic music, and watercolor.
about.paragraph3: Today I design and develop web projects focused on simplicity, usability, and a clear, intuitive experience. I'm interested in exploring how visual design, interaction, and small details change the way we use a product.
about.paragraph4: I also hold the Google UX Design Certificate, which reinforced my human-centered approach and accessible design.
about.paragraph5: This portfolio brings together personal projects, experiments, and continuous learning.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: These are some of the web projects I've built for fun, learning, or just to see if I could. Each one taught me something new and gave me a chance to experiment with different ideas and technologies.

socratika.title: Socratika: Chat With History's Greatest Minds
socratika.alt: Socratika - AI-powered platform for conversations with historical figures
socratika.paragraph1: A full-stack digital Agora that brings history's greatest minds to life through AI conversation. Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Google Genkit.
socratika.paragraph2: Features multilingual support, user accounts, Stripe subscriptions, real-time chat via Firebase, and a comprehensive admin interface. Styled with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui.

confessio.title: Confessio: AI Digital Sanctuary
confessio.alt: Confessio - AI-powered digital sanctuary for anonymous reflections
confessio.paragraph1: A quiet digital sanctuary for anonymous reflection and AI-guided spiritual support. Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Google Genkit.
confessio.paragraph2: Features multilingual support, smart content categorization, an interactive Wall of Intentions, and Firebase-powered data persistence. Styled with Tailwind CSS and Radix UI.

bitcoin.title: Bitcoin History
bitcoin.alt: Bitcoin History - Interactive data visualization of Bitcoin price history
bitcoin.paragraph1: An interactive D3.js visualization chronicling Bitcoin's price history with key events. Features logarithmic/linear scaling, zoom, event markers, and light/dark themes.
bitcoin.paragraph2: Built with Vite, D3.js v7, Bootstrap 5.3, and Tailwind CSS. Supports multiple languages and responsive layouts for exploring Bitcoin's financial journey.

party_invitations.title: Party Invitations
party_invitations.alt: Party Invitations - Responsive invitation generator web application
party_invitations.paragraph1: A responsive invitation generator built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
party_invitations.paragraph2: Features live customization, background search via the Unsplash API, and multiple export options including PNG, shareable links, QR codes, and .ICS calendar files.

when_lambo.title: When Lambo
when_lambo.alt: When Lambo - Interactive Bitcoin-to-Lambo calculator web application
when_lambo.paragraph1: A humorous Bitcoin-to-Lamborghini calculator that tells you how close you are to owning a supercar based on your crypto holdings.
when_lambo.paragraph2: Features real-time CoinDesk API data, multiple fiat currencies, confetti celebrations, and customizable Lamborghini models. Built with vanilla JS and Google Fonts (Cormorant, Proza Libre).

pulse_roots.title: PulseRoots: Interactive Electronic Music Genre Explorer
pulse_roots.alt: PulseRoots - Interactive electronic music genre explorer with D3.js visualization
pulse_roots.paragraph1: An interactive visualization of electronic music's evolution. Built with Astro and D3.js v6, it maps the complex web of genres and subgenres into an explorable hierarchical tree.
pulse_roots.paragraph2: Features detailed genre info panels, embedded Spotify previews, and responsive design. Explore major families like Ambient, Techno, and House and their subgenres.

new_contemporary_photography.title: New Contemporary Photography
new_contemporary_photography.alt: New Contemporary Photography - Flickr API photo gallery with responsive design
new_contemporary_photography.paragraph1: A single-page application that connects to the Flickr API to display random photos from a photography group.
new_contemporary_photography.paragraph2: Built with vanilla JavaScript, it features a fully responsive layout, smooth CSS animations, and a dark mode toggle.

drake.title: Drake Equation Visualizer
drake.alt: Drake Equation Visualizer - Interactive tool for estimating extraterrestrial civilizations
drake.paragraph1: An interactive 3D visualization of the Drake Equation that estimates the number of extraterrestrial civilizations in the Milky Way. Built with Three.js, Chart.js, and vanilla JavaScript.
drake.paragraph2: Adjust each parameter with real-time sliders and watch how it influences the final estimate. Features a 3D starfield, interactive charts, and a clean responsive layout.

plaintext.title: Plaintext: Typography-Driven Wallpaper Generator
plaintext.alt: Plaintext - Typography-driven wallpaper generator with Swiss design layouts
plaintext.paragraph1: A vanilla JavaScript and HTML5 Canvas wallpaper generator that transforms curated quotes into high-resolution typographic posters with Swiss design-inspired layouts.
plaintext.paragraph2: Features a bilingual interface (English/Spanish), dark mode, Zen mode, Google Fonts integration, custom color controls, and export options optimized for desktop and mobile.

only3left.title: Only 3 Left: Deceptive UX Patterns
only3left.alt: Only 3 Left - Interactive catalogue of deceptive UX patterns and dark patterns
only3left.paragraph1: An interactive catalogue of deceptive UX patterns — dark patterns, manipulative interfaces, and persuasive mechanisms used to influence decisions online. Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
only3left.paragraph2: Features 40 documented patterns across 10 categories, interactive live specimens (fake countdowns, cookie simulators, pricing traps), severity ratings, psychological breakdowns, and ethical alternatives. Fully bilingual (EN/ES).

less_is_more.title: Less Is More UI (AI Agent Skill)
less_is_more.description: An extensible skill for AI agents that enforces modernist design constraints during frontend generation. By integrating architectural principles and minimalist anti-patterns, it ensures that AI-generated interfaces remain timeless, structured, and user-centric.

marsconnect.title: UX Case Study: MarsConnect
marsconnect.alt: MarsConnect UX Case Study - Onboarding app design for Mars colonists
marsconnect.description: This project focuses on designing an onboarding app for future Mars colonists, aiming to guide users through essential procedures to adapt to their new life on the planet. The app also offers personalized recommendations and events to foster integration into the first Martian colony.

design_forward_summit.title: UX Case Study: Design Forward Summit
design_forward_summit.alt: Design Forward Summit UX Case Study - Web platform for design conference nominations
design_forward_summit.description: This project involves designing a web platform to facilitate the nomination process for a design conference, making it more intuitive and accessible. The goal was to simplify navigation, improve submission confirmations, and ensure a smooth user experience.

guardians_polecat.title: UX Case Study: Guardians of the Polecat
guardians_polecat.alt: Guardians of the Polecat UX Case Study - Platform for European polecat conservation awareness
guardians_polecat.description: The 'Guardians of the Polecat' project is an interactive platform designed to raise awareness about the conservation of the European polecat. Through a mobile app and a responsive website, it allows users to report sightings, participate in volunteer events, and symbolically adopt this endangered species.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Like what you see? Drop me a line. Tell me about your project or just say hello.

footer.note: This portfolio is a personal space for learning, experimenting, and sharing what I enjoy about the web.
footer.manifesto_suffix: principles. Every element here justifies its presence.
